note: Re-verify after CP8 remediation. AC #10 blocker and AC #8 risk from run 2026-07-14T18-33-33Z are CLOSED. Security audit not re-run: the CP8 diff touched only CLI display (cli._print_codes) + tests — no trust boundary, SQL, auth, or dependency change — so the prior security advisories are carried forward unchanged.

findings.message: AC #11 delete clicks-cascade is transitively covered: test_delete_removes_code_everywhere asserts 404 + gone-from-list but not that click rows were removed. The cascade is pinned at the unit layer (test_db.py::test_delete_cascades_clicks) against the same db.delete_code the CLI calls. Acceptable transitive coverage.
findings.remediation: Optional: after `shorturl delete`, assert the code's click count is 0 to re-anchor the cascade at the CLI layer.

findings.message: Auto-code collision retry / 500-after-exhaustion (R6, api._persist_code) is unexercised. Risk-based-expansion item, not one of the 15 ACs.
findings.remediation: Optional: monkeypatch code generation to a fixed value with a pre-seeded collision; assert bounded retry succeeds and exhaustion returns 500.

findings.message: [carried from 2026-07-14T18-33-33Z] flask/waitress declared with lower-bound floors only ('>=3.0'), no committed lockfile — installs are non-reproducible. Not a live vulnerability.
findings.remediation: Add compatible-release upper bounds ('flask>=3.0,<4.0', 'waitress>=3.0,<4.0') and commit uv.lock.

findings.message: [carried from 2026-07-14T18-33-33Z] No MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH on create_app; POST /api/codes buffers arbitrarily large JSON before validation. API-key gated (authenticated-only resource exhaustion). Defense-in-depth.
findings.remediation: Set app.config['MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH'] to a small limit (e.g. 64KB); optionally cap validator string lengths.

findings.message: [carried from 2026-07-14T18-33-33Z] Referer/User-Agent from the public redirect are stored verbatim and echoed in stats JSON. Safe today (JSON, not HTML); latent stored-XSS only if a future HTML UI renders top_referers unescaped.
findings.remediation: Keep serving as JSON (escape at render time if a UI is added); optionally truncate referer/user_agent on insert.
